```sql
    mutations.effect_on_stability,
    prediction_results.prediction_method,
    prediction_results.prediction_value,
    prediction_results.confidence_score,
    prediction_results.prediction_status,
    prediction_methods.method_name,
    prediction_methods.method_accuracy,
    prediction_datasets.dataset_name,
    prediction_datasets.dataset_size
FROM 
    proteins
INNER JOIN 
    mutations ON proteins.protein_id = mutations.protein_id
INNER JOIN 
    prediction_results ON proteins.protein_id = prediction_results.protein_id
INNER JOIN 
    prediction_methods ON prediction_results.prediction_method = prediction_methods.method_id
INNER JOIN 
    prediction_datasets ON prediction_results.prediction_id = prediction_datasets.prediction_id
WHERE 
    proteins.publication_date BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-12-31'
    AND proteins.molecular_weight >= 50000
    AND proteins.chain_count >= 2
    AND mutations.mutation_type = 'point mutation'
    AND prediction_results.prediction_status = 'completed'
    AND prediction_methods.method_accuracy >= 0.9
ORDER BY 
    proteins.publication_date DESC;
```

This query will fetch the detailed information about proteins, their mutations, prediction results, prediction methods, and datasets based on the specified conditions and order the results by the publication date in descending order.
